sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26612" key="dieceru/ghsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεξ-ερύγησις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n26612.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">power of belching forth,</tr_> Orac. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> <pb n="425" TEIform="pb"/> ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:6:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
